title: CF_DocCentralV3_AssignPermissions — Response Schema
description: Output returned by CF_DocCentralV3_AssignPermissions to calling flows. The flow always returns a structured response. Permission failure is non-fatal — callers must continue the primary operation and log the failure.

oneOf.title: Success response
oneOf.description: Returned when inheritance was broken and all configured principals were granted Read access on the Svi predmeti item and all specified document library files.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID used for this operation's audit log entries.

oneOf.title: Failure response
oneOf.description: Returned when an unexpected error prevented permission assignment (e.g. break inheritance failed, SharePoint REST API error). Callers must treat this as non-fatal for document creation — the document exists but its permissions may be incomplete.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID, if resolved before the failure.

callerGuidance.description: How calling flows must handle this response.
rules: Do NOT stop or fail the parent flow if success = false. The document has already been created — stopping now would leave an orphan item with no user access except the service account.
Log the failure in the parent flow's own AuditLog entry so administrators can identify documents with broken permissions.
Surface a user-facing warning in the Canvas App response when permission assignment fails: 'Dokument je kreiran, ali dodela prava nije uspela. Kontaktirajte administratora.'
Never retry this flow automatically. A retry without diagnosing the root cause may produce inconsistent permission state. Manual repair by an administrator is required.
Each call re-applies permissions from scratch (breaks inheritance again). Callers at approval step transitions must pass the full set of principals, not only the new approver.

powerAutomateOutputDefinition.description: Output parameters to define in the Respond to a PowerApp or flow action.

outputs.name: success
outputs.description: True if all permissions assigned, false on any failure.

outputs.name: correlationId
outputs.description: Correlation ID for audit log tracing.

outputs.name: errorCode
outputs.description: Machine-readable error code. Empty on success.
